task_completion.description: Navigate to the Inventory Kits section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Inventory Kits' tab or screen is active in the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new inventory kit
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Inventory Kit' form or creation screen is visible.
The name 'Holiday Gift Basket' is typed into the Item Name or Name field.
The value '79.99' is typed into the Sale Price field.

task_completion.description: Add the required components with exact quantities
task_completion.visual_evidence: The components list shows 'Chai Tea' with quantity 2, 'Extra Virgin Olive Oil' with quantity 1, and 'Dark Chocolate Assortment' with quantity 3.
The 'Holiday Gift Basket' kit is visible in the main Inventory Kits list view, indicating it was successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Manager.io application interface being used, rather than a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing sqlite3 commands or database scripts are visible.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Holiday Gift Basket' and '79.99' are entered into the proper form fields in Manager.io, not a separate text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Kit Name: 'Holiday Gift Basket'. Target Sale Price: 79.99. Required Components: 2x 'Chai Tea', 1x 'Extra Virgin Olive Oil', 3x 'Dark Chocolate Assortment'.
